text: May the hands of Abu Lahab perish, and he ËđhimselfËš perish!

foot_notes.1333: Since she used to carry thorny branches and throw them in the way of the Prophet ( ï·š ) , she will be carrying firewood in Hell.

text: around her neck will be a rope of palm-fibre. <sup foot_note=1334>1334</sup>

foot_notes.1334: This was one of the earliest sÃŧrahs revealed of the Quran. Paradoxically, for Abu Lahab to disprove the Quran, all he had to do was accept Islam because this verse condemns him to Hell.
